title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Medical Officer at Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute
jsonLd.description:
Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Medical Officer for our Varanasi operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute:
Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Rajiv Gandhi Cancer Institute!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
